parameters.subject: Incomplete Deal Details
parameters.message:
= {{ $json.rows.map(r => ` `).join("") }}
Deal Name Account Name Missing Deal Fields Missing Billing Fields
${r.dealName} ${r.accountName} ${r.dealMissingFields} ${r.billingMissingFields}

parameters.subject: =New Project Converted - {{ $json.Rows.Deal_Name }}
parameters.message:
=

Hello Team,

The following deal(s) have been Converted and are ready for execution. Please find the project and billing details below.

Deal & Project Details

{{ (() => { const currentDealId = $json.Rows.Deal_Id; const deal = $('Filter Deal Stage').all().find(d => d.json.id === currentDealId)?.json; if(!deal) return ""; return` `; })() }}
Deal Name Deal Owner Account Name Contact Name Service Division Service Type Engagement Type Amount Expected Start Date Expected End Date Estimated Delivery Shared Key Milestones Payment Terms Scope Document Closing Date
${deal.Deal_Name || "-"} ${deal.Owner.name || "-"} ${$json.Rows.Account_Name || "-"} ${deal.Contact_Name.name || "-"} ${deal.Service_Division || "-"} ${deal.Service_Type || "-"} ${deal.Engagement_Type || "-"} ${deal.Amount || "-"} ${deal.Expected_Start_Date || "-"} ${deal.Expected_End_Date || "-"} ${deal.Estimated_Delivery_time_shared || "-"} ${deal.Key_Milestones || "-"} ${deal.Payment_Terms || "-"} ${deal.Scope_Document || "-"} ${deal.Closing_Date || "-"}

Billing Details

Billing Street {{ $json.Billing_Street || '-' }}
Billing City {{ $json.Billing_City || '-' }}
Billing State {{ $json.Billing_State || '-' }}
Billing Country {{ $json.Billing_Country || '-' }}
Postal Code {{ $json.Billing_Code || '-' }}

Regards,
Devansh

parameters.subject: =Weekly Missing fields Report(CRM)
parameters.message:
=

Hello Manu,

Here is the weekly summary of all deals with missing mandatory or billing details.

{{ $json.ownersData.map(ownerBlock => ownerBlock.rows.map(r => ` `).join("") ).join("") }}
Owner Deal Name Account Missing Deal Fields Missing Billing Fields
${ownerBlock.ownerName} ${r.dealName} ${r.accountName} ${r.dealMissingFields} ${r.billingMissingFields}

Regards,
Devansh
